title: Faction Recruitment
description: Player attempts to recruit an NPC to their faction
opening: You find the NPC at their usual spot. This might be your chance to bring them to your side.

outcomes.min_response: I'll join you, but I have conditions.
outcomes.max_response: I've been waiting for you to ask. Count me in!

outcomes.min_response: You must be joking. I would never betray my people.
outcomes.max_response: I appreciate the offer, but my loyalty lies elsewhere.

outcomes.min_response: I see your point. We might have more in common than I thought.
outcomes.max_response: Exactly! That's precisely what I believe too.

outcomes.min_response: We clearly see the world very differently. I don't think this will work.
outcomes.max_response: I respect your view, but I can't agree with that philosophy.

outcomes.min_response: A leadership position? That's... intriguing. Tell me more.
outcomes.max_response: Now you're speaking my language. What's the role?

outcomes.min_response: You think you can buy me with promises of power? I'm insulted.
outcomes.max_response: I'm not motivated by personal ambition. Try again.

outcomes.min_response: You make a compelling argument. The greater good does matter.
outcomes.max_response: You're absolutely right. This is bigger than any of us.

outcomes.min_response: The 'greater good' is just rhetoric. Show me real action.
outcomes.max_response: I've heard those words before. They rarely mean what you think.

outcomes.min_response: That information changes things. I'll need to think about this.
outcomes.max_response: I had no idea. Thank you for trusting me with this.

nodes.npc_dialogue: What brings you here? We don't usually speak.

choices.text: I wanted to talk about our shared beliefs.
I need your help for something important - for everyone.
I want you to join our faction.
Join us and you'll have real influence.
Together we can make a real difference.

nodes.npc_dialogue: You're offering me quite a bit. What's the catch?

choices.text: Let me tell you what's really going on...
No catch. I need capable people. Are you in?

nodes.npc_dialogue: I want to believe you. But I need more than words.

choices.text: You'll have a leadership role in shaping our future.

nodes.npc_dialogue: That's... significant. You've given me a lot to think about.
